message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant "Application" as App
participant "«engine»\nAuto SDK Engine" as Engine <<engine>>
participant "«avs»\nAlexa" as Alexa <<avs>>

alt ["Activating Trial"]
    note left of App
        clicks `Activate Trial` button
        on screen to activate
        trial up-sell.
    end note
    App -> Engine : Publish SendConnectivityEvent message specifying **ACTIVATE_TRIAL** event
else ["Activating Paid Plan"]
    note left of App
        clicks `Activate Paid Plan` button
        on screen to activate
        paid plan up-sell.
    end note
    App -> Engine : Publish SendConnectivityEvent message specifying **ACTIVATE_PAID_PLAN** event
end

Engine -> Alexa : InitiateDataPlanSubscription event

alt ["Successful in sending event to Alexa"]
    Engine -> App : Receive SendConnectivityEventReply message with **SUCCESS** status
else ["on failure"]
    Engine -> App : Receive SendConnectivityEventReply message with **FAIL** status
end

@enduml
